scripts.prepackage: npm run prepare:electron-runtime && npm --prefix ../../.. run build:opencode-runtime
scripts.package:build: npm run build && npm run package
scripts.package:update:verify: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win --x64 --publish never --config.win.forceCodeSigning=true
scripts.package:publish: npm run package:update:verify && npm --prefix ../../backend run release:check -- && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win --x64 --publish always --config.win.forceCodeSigning=true
